_instructions: REAL-RECORD VALIDATION SLOT (level-2). Operator: (1) download a real TOKI/GYO record - either a completed public auction (kind=auction: reserve total -> winning-bid total) or a realized primary-market average (kind=project_avg: offered avg -> realized avg), (2) fill parser_input with the non-personal structured fields the TOKIAdapter reads, (3) fill expected_output with the manually-audited normalized label, (4) set manifest.record_id + retrieval_date, (5) flip is_real_official_record and manually_audited to true. Do NOT commit the raw artifact. Until both flags are true, tests SKIP this slot (PENDING).

manifest.notes: Awaiting operator retrieval of a genuine TOKI/GYO realized-sale or auction record. Not validated. Set domain to public_auction if the record is an auction.
